entries.description: Added src/utils/copilotCli.ts (probeCopilotCliPresenceCore mirrors probePythonPresenceCore: explicit dabblerSessionSets.copilotCliPath setting decides alone -> copilot on PATH, .exe-only on win32 to match the catalog module's shell=False subprocess semantics); wired resolveCopilotCliPresent thunk + copilotCliPresent payload flag into computeGettingStarted (getting-started-mode gated, quiet true default) and CustomSessionSetsView; contributed the copilotCliPath setting.

Added transportProfileBlockHtml (Full-only, omitted on Lightweight - the budgetBlockHtml conditional-render pattern) with api/copilot-cli radios, api default-checked; placed between the tier radios and the budget block; client.js change listener re-renders on flip (profileDirty). D6 env key warning additionally suppressed while copilot-cli is selected (the keyless target audience must not be told to set DABBLER_* keys) - judgment call recorded for verification.

Extended gsState/persistGsState/restoreGsState with the seat-profile family (transportProfile default api, profileDirty, lastProfileSeed) using the exact tier/mode seed-dirty-reload precedence; payload gained transportProfileSeed (host resolver deliberately omitted until Session 2 wires the durable transport.profile write - seed is null); client.js seed tuple extended (lastSeedProfile). Copilot-missing warning (copilotWarningHtml, data-gs-warning=copilot) renders hidden inside the block, visible only when copilot selected AND probe failed; absent payload flag fails quiet.

Layer-2 tests authored via routed test-generation (gemini-pro, $0.086) and adapted: copilotCli.test.ts (13 probe-core cases), 4 new gettingStartedHtml suites (block render, warning, D6 suppression, seat-profile seed precedence), computeGettingStarted thunk gating suite; existing payload/defaults assertions updated. 1133 passing, tsc clean.

Routed code-review (opus, $0.334): generator found no blocking issues; cross-provider verifier (gpt-5-4) returned ISSUES_FOUND with one Major on the explicit-.cmd probe path. Adjudicated with two empirical subprocess runs: the prescribed fix (reject explicit .cmd) was wrong (spawn genuinely executes explicit .cmd), but the underlying comment overclaim + test gap were real and fixed. record_adjudication written (context-gap / accept-dismissal).
Gated routed session-verification (gate verdict REQUIRED: blast-radius, breadth, build-ci-config). Raw output saved to s1-verification.md.

Hooked the catalog refresh strictly after the scaffold sequence (venv -> pip install -> template render) in buildProjectStructureNoPrompt, reusing the install outcome's venvPath via venvPython() (the same interpreter resolution Dabbler: Install ai-router uses); install-failed path gets an honest skip warning, never a silent bypass.

Auto-derived seat identity: deriveSeatId = seat- + sha256(hostname|username)[:12] (trimmed/lowercased inputs), deriveSeatLabel = workspace folder basename with 'workspace' fallback; no operator-typed fields (critique C1). Explicit copilotCliPath setting threads to --binary via resolveCopilotCliBinary (probe/spawn agreement).

runCatalogRefresh: cancellable child process with lockfile snapshot/restore on every non-completed path; vscode.window.withProgress cancellable notification (INDETERMINATE - the CLI prints nothing until its final line, per-model progress not parseable; critique m2 fallback recorded); teardown disposal hook in context.subscriptions with post-exit re-restore; post-kill force-settle timeout; win32 taskkill /T tree-kill.

Refresh result parsed from the CLI's own stdout line (never exit code); >=2 distinct providers gates the config write; transport.profile rendered as an anchored direct-child field replacement in the transport: block (renderTransportProfile - fail-loud on missing anchor or operator-edited value, never an append); refresh-ok-but-write-failed reported as its own config-write-failed state; readTransportProfile wired as the durable transportProfileSeed source (S1 handoff note).

54 new Layer-2 tests (routed test-generation, adapted platform-safe) covering seat identity, pinned argv, stdout parsing, anchored render (incl. nested-sub-block Major from the cross-verifier), cancel/teardown/late-cancel races, kill timeout, seat-setup outcomes, rider narrowing. Routed code-review (opus, gpt-5-4 auto-verify) returned 2 Major + 1 verifier Major - all fixed in-session with pinning tests; minors 3/4/6/8 fixed, atomic-write + POSIX tree-kill deferred to S3 failure matrix as named residuals.

Real live-seat dogfood via performCopilotSeatSetup (real venv python + real copilot CLI 1.0.68, scratch project): SUCCESS in 102s, 15/18 models confirmed, providers=[anthropic, google, openai], transport.profile: copilot-cli written, valid lockfile. Suites: Layer-2 mocha 1188 passing, tsc --noEmit clean, eslint clean, pytest 2483 passed/5 skipped, Playwright Layer 3 19 passed (client.js changed -> L-064-12 local run).

Routed gate: REQUIRED (blast-radius, multi-module, breadth). Cross-provider session verification on gpt-5-4 (OpenAI): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major: gitScaffold integration wiring unpinned) -> fixed via decideCopilotSeatSetup + injectable seams + gitScaffoldSeatSetup.test.ts; R2 held the same ledger issue (S2-V-001) partially-fixed -> BuildStructureSeams drives the REAL buildProjectStructureNoPrompt path in 4 more tests; R3 VERIFIED. Ledger discipline kept a single issueId across rounds. Post-fix suites: Layer-2 1206 passing, tsc/eslint clean, dist rebuilt, Playwright re-run 19 passed.
